args.query: SELECT Count(*) FROM Opportunity WHERE ContractID__c IS NOT NULL AND ContractID__c != 'None'

exec_args.sql: SELECT Count(*) FROM Opportunity WHERE ContractID__c IS NOT NULL AND ContractID__c != 'None'

args.query:
SELECT 
    t1.OwnerId,
    AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', CAST(t1.CreatedDate AS DATE), CAST(t2.CompanySignedDate AS DATE))) as avg_days
FROM Opportunity t1
JOIN Contract t2 
    ON (CASE WHEN t1.ContractID__c LIKE '#%' THEN SUBSTRING(t1.ContractID__c, 2) ELSE t1.ContractID__c END) = 
       (CASE WHEN t2.Id LIKE '#%' THEN SUBSTRING(t2.Id, 2) ELSE t2.Id END)
WHERE t2.CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND t2.CompanySignedDate <= '2023-04-30'
GROUP BY t1.OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 5

exec_args.sql:
SELECT 
    t1.OwnerId,
    AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', CAST(t1.CreatedDate AS DATE), CAST(t2.CompanySignedDate AS DATE))) as avg_days
FROM Opportunity t1
JOIN Contract t2 
    ON (CASE WHEN t1.ContractID__c LIKE '#%' THEN SUBSTRING(t1.ContractID__c, 2) ELSE t1.ContractID__c END) = 
       (CASE WHEN t2.Id LIKE '#%' THEN SUBSTRING(t2.Id, 2) ELSE t2.Id END)
WHERE t2.CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND t2.CompanySignedDate <= '2023-04-30'
GROUP BY t1.OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 5

args.query: SELECT Count(*) FROM Contract WHERE CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND CompanySignedDate <= '2023-04-30'

args.query: SELECT SUBSTRING(CompanySignedDate, 6, 2) as month, COUNT(*) FROM Contract WHERE CompanySignedDate LIKE '2023-%' GROUP BY month

args.query:
SELECT Count(*) 
FROM Opportunity t1
JOIN Contract t2 
    ON (CASE WHEN t1.ContractID__c LIKE '#%' THEN SUBSTRING(t1.ContractID__c, 2) ELSE t1.ContractID__c END) = 
       (CASE WHEN t2.Id LIKE '#%' THEN SUBSTRING(t2.Id, 2) ELSE t2.Id END)
WHERE t1.CreatedDate LIKE '2023-04-%'

args.query: SELECT Count(*) FROM Opportunity WHERE CloseDate LIKE '2023-04-%'

args.query:
SELECT t1.Id, t1.CloseDate, t2.CompanySignedDate 
FROM Opportunity t1
LEFT JOIN Contract t2 
    ON (CASE WHEN t1.ContractID__c LIKE '#%' THEN SUBSTRING(t1.ContractID__c, 2) ELSE t1.ContractID__c END) = 
       (CASE WHEN t2.Id LIKE '#%' THEN SUBSTRING(t2.Id, 2) ELSE t2.Id END)
WHERE t1.CloseDate LIKE '2023-04-%'

args.query:
SELECT t1.OwnerId, t2.CompanySignedDate, t1.CreatedDate 
FROM Opportunity t1
JOIN Contract t2 
    ON (CASE WHEN t1.ContractID__c LIKE '#%' THEN SUBSTRING(t1.ContractID__c, 2) ELSE t1.ContractID__c END) = 
       (CASE WHEN t2.Id LIKE '#%' THEN SUBSTRING(t2.Id, 2) ELSE t2.Id END)
WHERE t2.CompanySignedDate LIKE '2023-04-%'
